selection_rationale: Anchor-centred bidirectional sequence retaining the continuous, fully visible rack interval. The selected views preserve thin pole, hooks, and feet without merging the nearby whiteboard support; bad or materially blocked directions are excluded instead of forcing a nominal orbit.

preliminary_rejections.ring-04: monitor and desk materially obscure the rack base
preliminary_rejections.ring-05: target is materially occluded by desk/chair geometry
preliminary_rejections.ring-08: person/chair background creates an ambiguous thin-structure boundary
preliminary_rejections.ring-09: whiteboard support occludes or confuses the target identity
preliminary_rejections.ring-10: target is materially occluded by the whiteboard
preliminary_rejections.upper-02: target is materially occluded by desk and monitor geometry
preliminary_rejections.replacement-00: chair and foreground desk obscure the rack base
preliminary_rejections.replacement-02: edge-on rack silhouette is too weak for reliable association
preliminary_rejections.replacement-04: foreground monitor/chair obscures the rack base
preliminary_rejections.replacement-05: person/chair background creates an ambiguous thin-structure boundary
preliminary_rejections.replacement-06: whiteboard edge materially occludes the rack
